matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: DEA of the phospho-null mutant condition, P301L-KXGA, and P301L-KXGS sTurbo TauRD identified 429 significantly different proteins
The KXGA construct was generated by site-directed mutagenesis of residues S262, S293, S324, and S356 to encode for alanine residues.
Five sTurbo TauRD plasmid constructs, N-sTurbo TauRD, C-sTurbo TauRD, and 2A sTurbo TauRD (P301L, WT, and KXGA), were created
Cells were harvested or fixed 48 h post-transfection.
A fresh 200 μM biotin solution was made by diluting the stock in serum-free (SF) media.
biotin positive groups were incubated in the 200 μM biotin supplemented media for 1 h

replicate_hints: Three biological replicates were collected for experiments where transfection conditions included: N-terminal split TurboID (N-sTurbo) TauRD, C-terminal split TurboID (C-sTurbo) TauRD, both N-and C-sTurbo TauRD, or reagent alone (mock).
HEK cells were prepared with four biological replicates in two experimental batches and a third batch consisting of two biological replicates, totaling 10 per transfection condition.
SH-SY5Y cells were prepared with four biological replicates for each transfection condition.

evidence: DEA revealed 1090 total significantly different proteins; 761 were increased in sTurbo TauRD pulldowns, whereas 329 proteins were enriched in Mock pulldowns
